<?php /** * CertificateList * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * CertificateList * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class CertificateList { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'tbsCertList' => TBSCertList::MAP, 'signatureAlgorithm' => AlgorithmIdentifier::MAP, 'signature' => ['type' => ASN1::TYPE_BIT_STRING] ] ]; }
